description_long: This is a rectangular, industrial-style metal cabinet or shelf unit with two open compartments, separated by a single horizontal shelf. The structure is robust, with thick, flat panels forming the sides, top, bottom, and shelf, all finished in a uniform matte gray color. The front is completely open, lacking any doors or visible handles, and the interior is empty, revealing metal brackets or supports at the corners for reinforcement. The back panel is solid and features mounting brackets at the top, suggesting it is designed to be wall-mounted. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban utility spaces where durability and easy access are prioritized.
description: A sturdy, open-front metal cabinet or shelf with two compartments and wall-mounting brackets, finished in matte gray. Its industrial design is ideal for urban utility or garage settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open compartments, interior brackets, and the open, accessible design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat side panel and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the solid back panel and visible wall-mounting brackets at the top corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other solid side panel.
